content: When building site-wide detectors for cruisinginthewake, scope must include ships/, ports/, articles/, authors/, cruise-lines/ — not 'ships only' as a starting point that drifts later. Operator's redirect when image-reuse scanner shipped ship-only: 'scan the port pages, and venues, and every page.' Allowlist sections where reuse is legitimate (assets/brand/, assets/icons/, assets/social/ — a logo is a logo). Asset roots to walk: assets/ships, assets/img, images/ports, assets/venues, assets/articles, authors, assets/images/restaurants, assets/images/entertainment.
